name: Nata Nael
title: Software Engineer
summary: Software engineer with 4 years of experience building enterprise web applications and do training for junior engineers. Focused on delivering quality solutions with technologies.

highlights: Developed and maintain 7+ projects for client company, with focus on ERP systems and internal tools that streamlined company workflows through IoT.
Improved application reliability by maintaining a live web application, achieving >80% SLA through timely identification and resolution of user-reported bugs.
Decreased bug reported by 80% on developing new features for Supply Chain Web Application by implementing automated E2E testing.
Researched and validated technology stacks based on client requirements, delivering Proofs of Concept (PoCs) to demonstrate feasibility and value.
Developed LMS and Survey Management System to be used internally by 1000+ employees across 3+ countries.
Reduced survey participant setup time by 50% by automating HRIS data integration, eliminating manual work for 65 personnel and ensuring data consistency.
Increased decision-making accuracy by introducing A/B testing pipelines that identified the most effective design and feature changes.
Reduced bug detection time by 50% by implementing Sentry for client-side error logging.
Improved team scalability by mentoring and evaluating approximately 100+ engineers, reducing onboarding time by 30% and improving probation pass rates by 50%.
Developed Advertising Media Dashboard for renting 50+ digital and mobile billboards across Jakarta.
Improved functionality of the Advertisement Monitoring Dashboard by contributing feature enhancements using Vue.js, Tailwind CSS.
Increased development velocity by developing an internal component system for Front End Team and implement Storybook for the component documentation.
Reduced campaign analysis time by implementing Google analytics to analyze user behavior in the web app.

education.institution: Kwik Kian Gie School of Business
education.notes: Graduated with honors; named best graduate of the 2015 batch.

projects.name: Caelum Hospitality Website
projects.description: A landing page of a Hospitality Company based in Jakarta and Banjarmasin. Built with NextJS 15 and Typescript. Scores 93 PageSpeed (mobile) and 90+ SEO

projects.name: Aeris Hotel Website
projects.description: Website to display all facilities of a hotel and have a feature to make a room reservation through email or whatsapp message. Pagespeed insights performance score of 99 and SEO score of 100

projects.name: Sienna Living Kebon Sirih Website
projects.description: Hotel website in Kebon Sirih, Central Jakarta, with simple room reservation via WhatsApp API. Scores 100 on Google PageSpeed (desktop) and 90+ on SEO.
